title: Uranium
description: Uranium - Simple quality of life improvements the community actually wants. No bloat, just better gameplay.
body:
*Uranium Mod - Official Description

*Uranium - Quality of Life, Simplified
A carefully crafted collection of features that the Minecraft community has been asking for. Uranium focuses on removing the tedious parts of gameplay while keeping the core experience intact.

✨ What's Inside

*🎯 Auto Pickup Filter

Items automatically go to your inventory — but only the ones you choose
Press F to toggle the filter on/off
Perfect for mining or farming without cluttering your inventory
Default whitelist includes ores, crops, and common resources
Customize which items get auto-picked up
Use /uranium help for starters

*🌾 Smart Farming

Crops replant themselves when harvested
Works with wheat, carrots, potatoes, beetroot, and nether wart
Toggle on/off by sneaking while harvesting
Automatically uses seeds from your inventory
Never manually replant again

*🪓 Instant Tree Chop

Break one log with a gold axe, and the entire tree falls
Gold axe breaks after one use - a fair trade for instant chopping
Only works with gold axes (no other axes have this ability)
Perfect for quick tree clearing when you need it
Chops all logs and leaves in one go

*🛡️ Tool Protection

Your tools stop working before they break
Never lose that perfect enchanted gear again
Works with all damageable items
Audio cues keep you informed
Stops at 1 durability remaining

*🪜 Fast Ladder Climb

Climb ladders and vines 2.5x faster
Works for both ascending and descending
No keybinds needed - just climb normally
Makes vertical builds much more enjoyable

*🚪 Auto Door Close

Doors close automatically after 3 seconds
Works with all door types (wood, iron, etc.)
Smart detection - won't close if you're nearby
Keeps your base secure without extra effort

*⛏️ Smelter's Pickaxe

Netherite pickaxes automatically smelt ores when mined
Get ingots directly instead of raw ore
Works with iron, gold, copper, and ancient debris
Also smelts sand to glass, logs to charcoal, and more
The ultimate endgame mining tool


🎯 Design Philosophy
Uranium is built on simple principles:

Respect your time - Remove repetitive tasks
Protect your progress - Don't lose what you've earned
Stay vanilla-friendly - No gameplay mechanics changed
Keep it optional - Features can be toggled when needed

Every feature is something players have requested countless times. No complicated configs, no bloat, just the improvements everyone wants.

📋 Requirements

Fabric Loader & Fabric API (Required)
Java 21+


⚖️ License
All Rights Reserved - Proprietary software by Lewis Fulspam.

🌟 Who Is This For?
Everyone. Seriously.
Whether you're building massive farms, mining deep underground, clearing forests, or just playing casually - Uranium removes the annoying parts while keeping Minecraft feeling like Minecraft.
Stop fighting the game. Start enjoying it.

🎮 Quick Start

Install Fabric Loader and Fabric API
Drop Uranium into your mods folder
Launch Minecraft
Type /uranium help in-game
Press F to toggle Auto Pickup Filter
Enjoy your improved gameplay!


🔥 Feature Highlights

Gold Axe = Instant tree chopping (breaks after use)
Netherite Pickaxe = Auto-smelting ores
F Key = Toggle item pickup filter
Sneak = Disable auto-replant temporarily
All Tools = Protected at 1 durability


Uranium - Because Minecraft should be fun, not frustrating.
